name: Ann Landers's Noodle & Spinach Ring
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook noodles in salted water until al dente. Drain.
2. Cook spinach in a separate pot with half a cup of salted water, only until thawed and heated through. Drain.
3. In a buttered 2-quart ring mold, alternate layers of noodles, spinach, bread crumbs, and cheese.
4. Combine remaining ingredients (salt, Worcestershire sauce) and pour over the casserole.
5. Bake in a pan set in hot water at 350°F for about 45 minutes.
